mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit_appointment WHERE TO_DAYS(gmt_create) = TO_DAYS(NOW())
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payment_order WHERE status = 2 AND TO_DAYS(pay_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM power_account WHERE TO_DAYS(gmt_create) = TO_DAYS(NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_medical_card WHERE TO_DAYS(gmt_create) = TO_DAYS(NOW())
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payment_order WHERE status = 2
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(refund_amount), 0) FROM payment_order WHERE status = 4
SELECT DATE(gmt_create) AS `date`, COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM visit_appointment WHERE gmt_create >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(gmt_create) ORDER BY `date`

SELECT DATE(pay_time) AS `date`, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS `amount` FROM payment_order WHERE status = 2 AND pay_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(pay_time) ORDER BY `date`
SELECT DATE(gmt_create) AS `date`, COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM power_account WHERE gmt_create >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(gmt_create) ORDER BY `date`

SELECT hs.name AS `name`, COUNT(va.id) AS `value` FROM visit_appointment va JOIN visit_plan vp ON va.plan_id = vp.id JOIN hospital_doctor hd ON vp.doctor_id = hd.id JOIN hospital_special hs ON hd.special_id = hs.id GROUP BY hs.id, hs.name ORDER BY `value` DESC LIMIT #{top}

SELECT hd.name AS `name`, COUNT(va.id) AS `value` FROM visit_appointment va JOIN visit_plan vp ON va.plan_id = vp.id JOIN hospital_doctor hd ON vp.doctor_id = hd.id GROUP BY hd.id, hd.name ORDER BY `value` DESC LIMIT #{top}
SELECT CASE `status` WHEN 0 THEN '待就诊' WHEN 1 THEN '已爽约' WHEN 2 THEN '已取消' WHEN 3 THEN '已完成' ELSE '未知' END AS `name`, COUNT(*) AS `value` FROM visit_appointment GROUP BY `status` ORDER BY `status`

SELECT CASE vp.`time` WHEN 1 THEN '上午' WHEN 2 THEN '下午' ELSE '其他' END AS `name`, COUNT(va.id) AS `value` FROM visit_appointment va JOIN visit_plan vp ON va.plan_id = vp.id GROUP BY vp.`time` ORDER BY vp.`time`
